name: 4000 Episodes Ki Khushi
desc: Sodhi learns there's an issue with his car's number plate while the community joyfully marks the milestone of 4000 episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah.

name: Sodhi Ki Nayi Gaadi
desc: Sodhi celebrates his new car by taking all kids on a joy ride. However, he soon finds out that his car is not where he parked it. Where could it be?

name: Permanent Number Ka Celebration
desc: Sodhi shares sweets with everyone in Gokuldham to celebrate getting the permanent number for his new car. Later, Sodhi and Tapu Sena decide to have a party together.

name: Sodhi Ke Naye Number
desc: Taarak convinces Anjali to make a sweet treat. Tapu Sena asks Gogi for a treat as his father got a new car. Sodhi excitedly shares the news of his new car number in Gokuldham society.

name: Sodhi's New Car
desc: Roshan surprises Sodhi with a new car, confessing the old one was never stolen. Inspector Pandey complains about Gokuldham residents causing trouble again.

name: Ek Aur Complaint
desc: Inspector Pandey plans to arrest all Gokuldham men, bringing them to the society compound. Later, Inspector Pandey receives a call about two people filing a complaint about Sodhi's missing car, stirring confusion.

name: Inspector Pandey Is Angry
desc: Inspector Pandey wants to solve the case on his own. Gokuldham women debate informing Roshan about Sodhi's stolen car. Later, as Pandey gets crucial information about the car which makes him suspect that Gokuldham residents are making a fool out of him.

name: Inspector Pandey Looks For Sodhi's Car
desc: Inspector Pandey discloses Popatlal's involvement in the car theft, and Gokuldham residents vow not to interfere. Together, they join the inspector to search for Sodhi's car.

name: Sher Ki Missing Complaint
desc: Gokuldham men discover Sodhi's car missing, report it at the police station, and unintentionally disrupt Chalu Pandey's outing plans.

name: Wrong Match For Popatlal
desc: Popatlal wants his umbrella back, but Sodhi insists on knowing his car's location first. Popatlal tearfully shares the story of Anokhi leaving him due to Sodhi's car but refuses to disclose its whereabouts. Taarak suggests Anokhi may not have been the right match for him.

name: Gaddi Kaha Hai?
desc: Popatlal angrily confronts Sodhi, blaming his car for ruining his date. He insults Sodhi and reveals he left the car in the jungle, angering Sodhi, but Popatlal refuses to disclose the exact location. What will Sodhi do now?

name: Gaddi Band Ho Gayi
desc: "Popatlal's meeting with Anokhi triggers memories for Anjali and Taarak. Anokhi suggests they get to know each other better before making commitments. Later, Popatlal's car stops, and he asks Anokhi for help pushing it."

name: Popatlal's Date With Anokhi
desc: Popatlal prepares to meet Anokhi, and Sodhi enhances his car for a romantic evening for Popatlal and Anokhi. Champaklal informs Jethalal about attending a bhajan kirtan with Tapu Sena. Later, Popatlal takes Anokhi on a drive.

name: Jethalal Has Jalebi And Fafda
desc: Popatlal prays for his relationship at the temple, while Jethalal, craving jalebi and fafda, considers inviting Taarak and Babita. Jethalal invites Taarak for breakfast, and Taarak waits for Anjali to leave to visit Jethalal's house discreetly.

name: Popatlal Ki Date
desc: Popatlal and Anokhi decide to go on a long drive together. Tapu Sena congratulates Popatlal, and they celebrate at the mall. Later, Sodhi offers to lend Popatlal his car for the long drive. Will everything go according to Popatlal's plan?

name: Tapu Sena Helps Popatlal
desc: Lost in the mall, Popatlal searches for Tapu Sena. He encounters an unmarried girl, and Tapu Sena seizes the opportunity to help Popatlal make a good impression on her.

name: Sher Ko Kara Repair
desc: Sodhi plans to repair his car. Jethalal suggests getting a new car, but Sodhi chooses to repair the existing one. Later, Sodhi gets ready to drop Roshan at her relative's place and Tapu Sena at the mall. Will his car work fine now?

name: Sher Kharab Ho Gaya
desc: Gokuldham men search for Sodhi's friend, Sukhi. They push the car and Sodhi tries to start it but it doesn't work. Later, Gokuldham ladies worry for them.

name: Sodhi Ki Gadi Ruk Gayi
desc: Bhide is urged to throw a party as Sonu triumphs over Tapu in badminton. Sodhi celebrates with soda, sharing stories about his lucky car. However, Sodhi's joy is short-lived as his friend informs him that the car has broken down. Now, what will Sodhi do?

name: Bhide Gets His Things Back
desc: Bhide pretends to be upset about his old things, but Madhavi returns them, realizing their sentimental value. Meanwhile, Sukhi tells Sodhi that his car is lucky.

name: Bhide Ki Anmol Yaadein
desc: Madhavi loses her old walkman, which makes her understand the attachment Bhide had to his old belongings. Madhavi and Sonu decide to go to the shop and bring Bhide's belongings back.

name: Popatlal Maan Gaya
desc: Bhide seeks Taarak's assistance to persuade Popatlal about the importance of his old belongings. Popatlal tries to buy Bhide's box, but the shopkeeper refuses to sell it. Later, Madhavi shares her diary with her friends.

name: Goli's Wise Advice
desc: Popatlal and Madhavi covertly sell Bhide's old items, intending to keep it a secret from him. Bhide confides in Goli about the situation, and Goli offers him wise counsel.

name: Madhavi Ko Pata Chala Sach
desc: Abdul tells Bhide about garbage being dumped in the society office, in front of Madhavi. Later, Madhavi discovers the truth, realizing both Bhide and Sodhi deceived her.

name: Purana Saman Pheko
desc: Bhide insists on keeping his old belongings, explaining their sentimental value to Madhavi. Will Madhavi let him keep his old things?

name: Jagah Kam Aur Saman Zyada
desc: Bagha crafts a sales-boosting poem for Gada Electronics. Simultaneously, Bawri pitches a new scheme to Jethalal, Bagha, and Nattu Kaka. Bhide urges Madhavi to organize their home, leading her to decide to declutter by discarding unnecessary items.

name: Naye Saal Ka Josh
desc: Bhide asks Jethalal to give the maintenance cheque on time. Meanwhile, Champaklal returns to Gokuldham society and meets Tapu Sena.

name: Pichle Saal Ke Events
desc: Anjali and Taarak are happy with Tapu Sena's idea and discuss all the events from last year. Later, Babita wishes Jethalal a happy new year.

name: Kisne Diya Gift?
desc: Anjali isn't fond of her gift, but Taarak encourages her to accept it graciously. Meanwhile, Bhide is delighted to discover that Madhavi is the one behind the thoughtful gift for Sonu. Who will pay the fine now?

name: Acche Aur Bure Gifts
desc: Gokuldham members continue picking up gifts. Are they liking their gifts or not?

name: Gift Uthao
desc: Bawri suggests a creative way for everyone to express their feelings about the gifts. The person with the least-liked gift will be subject to a fine.

name: Santa Collects Gifts
desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha dress up as Santa and go to everyone's house in Gokuldham society and collect their gifts. Later, everyone gathers for the party.

name: Secret Gift Ka Confusion
desc: Gokuldham residents contemplate their gift ideas for the Secret Santa. Will they be able to make the right decision before the party?

name: Chit Uthao
desc: Tapu Sena visits each house, inviting everyone to draw a chit from a bowl, determining the recipient of their gift.

name: Fine Dena Hoga
desc: A debate ensues over the ideal fine for an unpopular gift, prompting everyone to brainstorm diverse and thoughtful gift ideas later on. Whose gift will be the worst?

name: Meeting Ka Reason
desc: Gokuldham members gather in the playhouse for a meeting, yet they remain curious about its purpose. Later, Tapu unveils his plan. What exactly is Tapu's strategy?

name: Tapu Sena Ka Idea
desc: Tapu tells Tapu Sena what they should organize for the society's party and requests Bhide to invite everyone to the clubhouse, but Bhide refuses. What unfolds next in this situation?

name: Sodhi Aur Roshan Ki Party
desc: Everyone celebrates at a party held in honour of Roshan and Sodhi, making a grand entrance. Later, Champaklal decides to go on a trip with his friends.

name: Anniversary Ki Mithas
desc: Sodhi and Roshan distribute Kada Prasad among all their friends and invite them to their anniversary party. Will things go smoothly for them this time?

name: Sodhi Aur Roshan Ki Sulha
desc: Sodhi offers a sincere apology to Roshan, mending their differences. Afterwards, the men of Gokuldham question Bhide about his actions, wondering why he went behind their backs.

name: Roshan Ghar Chor Kar Mat Jao
desc: Jethalal declares his ignorance about Sodhi's whereabouts to everyone. Despite exhaustive efforts, Sodhi remains untraceable, leading to Roshan's decision to depart from Gokuldham society and stay with her parents.

name: Jethalal Bhi Hai Gayab
desc: Gokuldham men apologize to Champaklal for their deception regarding Sodhi. Meanwhile, Jethalal is discovered missing from his bedroom, leading everyone to speculate that he and Sodhi might be hiding together.

name: Sodhi Kaha Hai?
desc: Roshan visits Iyer's house, inquiring about Sodhi's whereabouts. Later, she checks Taarak's house but can't find him there either. Where could Sodhi be?

name: Sodhi Ka Jhooth Pakda Gaya
desc: Bhide tries to assure Roshan that Sodhi is not at fault, while Sodhi lies to her. Later, Roshan visits Popatlal's house to catch Sodhi red-handed. What will happen now?

name: Bhide Ki Chinta
desc: All the men are worried about Sodhi's truth coming out in front of everyone. Meanwhile, Roshan arrives at Bhide's house to ask about Sodhi. Will she find out the truth?

name: Kya Sodhi Ka Jooth Pakda Jayega?
desc: While Sodhi lies to Roshan over the phone about being on his way back, his friends who left earlier return to party with him. Meanwhile, Roshan finds the keys to Sodhi's car.

name: Planning Sodhi's Escape
desc: The male members of the society come up with an elaborate plan to hide Sodhi at Popatlal's house. Will Sodhi succeed in lying to Roshan?

name: Roshan Returns To Gokuldham
desc: While Roshan enters her house, Sodhi and his friends hide on the balcony and make their way to Bhide's balcony. How long will Sodhi hide from Roshan?

name: Museebat Ne Yaad Kiya Hai
desc: All the men of Gokuldham society help Sodhi clean up after he parties with his friends. Soon, Abdul calls to tell them that Roshan has just entered the society. Will Sodhi get caught?

name: Sodhi Parties With His Friends
desc: Sodhi gets convinced by his friends to party. The male members of the society decide to confront Sodhi as to why they weren't invited for the same. Will Sodhi forget to wish Roshan at twelve while busy partying?

name: Anniversary Ki Taiyyari
desc: Sodhi and his friends are excited about his anniversary. Meanwhile, the men of the colony try to figure out what gift to give Sodhi and his wife.

name: Sodhi's Anniversary
desc: Jethalal gets yelled at by his father for delaying a payment. Meanwhile, Sodhi tells everyone that tomorrow is his marriage anniversary.

name: Sakharam Ko Lagi Chot
desc: Bhide gets angry at Tapu Sena for playing badminton near Sakhram. Later, Roshan receives a piece of good news.

name: Khush Rehne Ka Secret
desc: It's a happy vibe in the Gokuldham society as everyone is in a good mood post-Diwali. What new adventures will they be up to?

name: Daya Ka Intezaar
desc: Jethalal and all the colony members are sad when they don't see Daya with Sundar. However, Sundar passes on the message that Daya sent for Jethalal and lights a diya on her behalf.

name: Daya Bhabhi Kaha Hai?
desc: All the colony members are upset that Sundar didn't get Daya Bhabhi with him. How will the colony members react to this?

name: Swagat Samaroh Hua Flop
desc: Jethalal and other Gokuldham members gather to welcome Daya. However, they are shocked to find that Daya is not with Sundar. What will happen now?

name: Sundar Ka Intezaar
desc: Tapu Sena challenges Goli to snatch sukdi from Champaklal's hand. Tapu contacts Sundar to inquire about his location. Is Daya really coming with him?

name: Sundar Ka Vaada
desc: Taarak is worried if Sundar will fulfil his promise. Later, everyone celebrates Diwali in Gokuldham society. When is Daya coming?

name: Daya Ke Aane Ki Khushi
desc: Everyone is excited when they hear Daya is coming back. Jethalal, Champaklal, and Tapu joyfully engage in garba to celebrate her homecoming. However, amidst the happiness, Taarak is anxious, fearing that something untoward might occur during Diwali.

name: Kiski Galti Hai?
desc: Gokuldham men tell Mahila Mnadal what happened at the police station while Jethalal finally gets to talk to Sundar. What will Sundar say now?

name: Misunderstanding Clear Karo
desc: Jethalal explains to ACP Prithvi that his messages were intended for Sundar, not Jagruti, and apologizes for any misunderstanding. Surprisingly, ACP Prithvi and his wife are revealed to be Daya's family friends. Will they withdraw their complaint against Jethalal?

name: Jethalal Ke Khilaaf Complaint
desc: Gokuldham Society members arrive at the police station to convince Inspector Panday to let Jethalal go. Will Inspector Panday listen to them?

name: ACP Ki Biwi Ko Di Dhamki
desc: Inspector Panday informs Jethalal that he has been accused of threatening ACP Prithvi's wife, Jagruti, from Ahmedabad. Jethalal denies these allegations. What will happen next?

name: Humne Kisko Dhamkaya?
desc: Mahila Mandal prays for Jethalal while Jethalal finds Bagha and Nattu Kaka in jail. Why are they in jail?

name: Reason Kya Hai?
desc: Inspector Panday is not telling anyone why he's arresting Jethalal and Gokuldham members protest against it. What will happen now?

name: Jethalal Ne Kara Kya Hai?
desc: Police come to arrest Jethalal while he talks in his sleep. Later, everyone wants to know what crime Jethalal has committed.

name: Apradhi Jethalal
desc: Tapu books tickets for Jethalal and Taarak for Ahmedabad to bring Daya back home. Later, police arrive at the Gokuldham Society to arrest Jethalal. How will Jethalal go to Ahmedabad now?

name: Sundar Ka Vaada
desc: Jethalal is worried that Sundar may not keep his promise. He makes plans to travel to Ahmedabad himself, along with Taarak, to bring Daya back.

name: Jethalal Gets Impatient
desc: Jethalal talks to Daya's acquaintance and asks him to go to Daya's house and make him talk to her. Later, Jethalal and Bagha try to call Sundar from an unknown number. Will he pick up the call now?

name: Sundar Ko Phone Lagao
desc: Jethalal meets a customer who's in a similar problem as him as his wife is also not coming home. Bagha, Nattu Kaka and Jethalal try to contact Sundar to ask about Daya. Will they get in touch with him?

name: Surprise Dham
desc: Mahila Mandal goes to Jethalal's house to find out when is Daya coming back while Champaklal's friend pulls Champaklal's leg. Will they find out the exact date when Daya is coming back?

name: Diwali Ka Maahol
desc: Bhide gets angry at Tapu for throwing water at him. Bhide goes to stop Tapu Sena from wasting water but falls down. Later, Taarak surprises Anjali with a present.

name: Diwali Ki Tayariyan
desc: Sodhi plays a prank on Bhide and steals society's notice board. Gokuldham members want Daya to come back and make their Diwali even more special. When is Daya coming back?

name: Jethalal's Surprise Gift
desc: Jethalal finally brings a surprise gift for Babita with Taarak's help. Will Babita like the gift?

name: Jethalal Ka Sapna Toota
desc: Jethalal asks Popatlal not to tell anyone that he wanted to buy land on the moon. Jethalal is upset because he couldn't fulfil Babita's wish. What will he do now?

name: Sapna Reh Gaya Sapna
desc: Jethalal realises he had slept and he dreamt about buying land on the moon. Jethalal goes to the Moon Residential Program office. Will he buy land on the moon now?

name: Babita Ke Liye Best Gift
desc: Jethalal tells Babita about his surprise in a very special way. How will everyone react to this?

name: Jethalal Ka Zabardast Surprise
desc: Jethalal tells Babita he has a big surprise for her and asks everyone to come to the clubhouse in the evening. How will everyone react when they find out about Jethalal's surprise?

name: Chand Par Padosi
desc: Chand Bhai convinces Jethalal to buy three plots on the moon. How will Babita and Gokuldham members react when they find out about this?

name: Moon Residential Program
desc: Bagha urges Jethalal to buy land on the moon as a good investment opportunity. Will this be a wise decision for Jethalal?

name: NASA Se Call
desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka tell customers about their festive special offers. Later, Jethalal gets a call from NASA. What is this call about?

name: Chand Par Zameen
desc: Sundar tells Jethalal that he's getting a piece of land on the moon at a very small price and asks Jethalal to give him the money for the same. What will Jethalal do now?

name: Babita Ka Mushkil Gift
desc: Anjali gets upset with Taarak for not giving her gifts while Jethalal dreams about Babita's gift. Later, Jethalal asks Sundar about Daya.

name: The Perfect Gift
desc: Jethalal is in distress as he struggles to find the right gift  and consults all his neighbours. Will he find the right gift?

name: Gift Ki Khoj
desc: Jethalal is confused about what to gift Babita. Later, Jethalal gets a bouquet for Babita but Iyer is allergic to flowers. What will Jethalal gift Babita?

name: Payment Ki Tension
desc: Babita's friend Vicky tears the cheque in front of Jethalal. Meanwhile, a phone call from Jethalal gets Taarak into trouble with his boss.

name: Cheque Pass Hoga Ya Nahi?
desc: Taarak and Jethalal are worried about whether Jethalal will get his money from Babita's friend on time or not. Later, Anjali gets angry when she finds unhealthy food in Taarak's bag. What will happen now?

name: Artists Kaha Hai?
desc: Tapu Sena welcomes all the Gokuldham members in their own unique style to Gokuldham's Navratri function. Everyone is waiting for the artists to come and perform at the function. Will they reach the society on time?

name: Bina Budget Ki Navratri
desc: Bhide gets angry when Popatlal asks him what he does with the society's budget. Tapu Sena comes up with a solution to Navratri on zero budget. Later, Bhide wants to know about Tapu Sena's surprise.

name: Sabse Pehele Aya Jethalal
desc: Jethalal arrives at the meeting spot before everyone else and decides to hide and hear what Bhide says behind his back. Later, Bhide asks Jethalal to prove that he is the first one to arrive for the meeting.

name: Navratri Ke Liya Budget Nahi Hai
desc: Gokuldham men open Popatlal's box and end up spilling everything that was inside the box. Bhide tells Tapu Sena they don't have a budget to celebrate Navratri this year. What will happen now?

name: Ziddi Box
desc: Bhide protects his clothes from getting ruined as he's meeting Amit for a new order. Later, Popatlal asks everyone to open a box, but no one is able to open it. What is in the box?

name: Shiny Dandiya Sticks
desc: Jethalal thinks there's a ghost in his house. Tapu shows his glow in the dark dandiya sticks to Jethalal but Jethalal feels these sticks can be risky. Later, Jethalal scolds Bagha and Bawri when he overhears their conversation.

name: Vicky Ka Cheque
desc: Jethalal brings sweets for Taarak and tells him about his big deal and how everything went smoothly. Later, Nattu Kaka tells Jethalal that there's some issue with Vicky's cheque that he gave Jethalal. What will Jethalal do now?

name: Babita Bani Mediator
desc: Jethalal and Vicky start fighting in front of Babita and Nisha. Babita tries to resolve the issue between Jethalal and Vicky. Will she succeed in doing so?

name: Chai Ne Bigadi Deal
desc: Jethalal orders tea and accidentally spills it on his client, Vicky, who gets angry and insults Jethalal. Later, Jethalal finds out that Vicky is Babita's friend's husband. What will happen now?

name: Babita Ki Dost
desc: Jethalal bumps into Champaklal and Champaklal gets angry. Popatlal meets Babita's friend and tries to impress her. Will she be impressed by Popatlal?

name: Gokuldham Is Blessed
desc: Gokuldham members feel blessed by god and they all thank Bhakti for it. Later, everyone gets the same dream about a god. What is the dream?

name: Goli Ka Confusion
desc: Goli celebrates with Bhakti and dances with her. Goli gets stuck in traffic and gets confused when he finds out someone has replaced him during the celebration. What will happen now?
